title: Spring Cherry Dutch Pancakes
description: A unique and delicious Dutch-inspired pancake recipe with cherry and spring flavors. Perfect for a weekend breakfast or brunch.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the spring water and fermented apple cider vinegar.
In a separate bowl, mix together the Dutch rolled oats, cherry jam, and a pinch of salt.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until a thick batter forms.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve warm with additional cherry jam and Dutch spring butter, if desired.
